titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 56: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 56. (A.R. No. 238 of 1944.) VĀLIKAṆḌAPURAM, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālikaṇḍēśvara temple.

It records an undertaking given by the body called Saṅkarapāḍi-nagarattār of the village Vālikaṇḍapuram to contribute one uḻakku of ghee measured by nārāyam to burn a perpetual lamp for god Paramēśvara in the temple of Tiruvālīśvaram in Vālikaṇḍapuram in Vaṉnāḍu after accepting 7(1/2) kaḻañju of pure gold weighed by the nagarakkal deposited for the purpose by Mādaṉ Vaikunthan alias Raṇaraṅgarāgappallavaraiyaṉ of Puliyūr in Vaṉ-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu vaṉṉā
ṭṭu vālikaṇṭapurattu tiruvāliccurattu parameśvarark
ku Innāṭṭuppuḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ mātaṉ vaiykuntaṉāyiṉa Ira
ṇaraṅkarākap pallavaraiyaṉ vaitta nontā viḷakku O
ṉṟukku Ivvūril nakarakallāl cempoṉ Eḻu kaḻai
ñcaraiyum koṇṭu nārāyattāluḻak keṇṇai Iravum paka
lum Aṭṭuvomivvūr caṅkarappāṭi nakarattom Itu cantirā
tittavaṟ EriyaThe two letters riya are found engraved above the line over the letters of tta in the beṅinning of line no. 8.paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .. ceppuviḷakku Oṉṟu
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
